title: Armor Swap
description: Quickly switch armor in the inventory menu.
body: # Armor Swap ![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/arm32x/armor-swap?label=license&style=flat-square) ![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/arm32x/armor-swap?logo=github&style=flat-square) ![GitHub Repo stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/arm32x/armor-swap?logo=github&style=flat-square) ![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/arm32x/armor-swap?logo=github&style=flat-square) ![CurseForge](https://curse.nikky.moe/api/img/513106?style=flat-square&logo) ![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=5da545&label=modrinth&query=downloads&suffix=%20downloads&url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.modrinth.com%2Fapi%2Fv1%2Fmod%2FUqHiQUjv&style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,) Quickly switch armor in the inventory menu. ## FAQ #### Can you port this to Forge? No. #### Can you port this to *\*? No. #### Can you update this to *\*? Maybe.
